DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-09-2020 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT AIRPORT VAN RENTAL, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is adopted as follows:

Defendant Airport Van Rental, Inc.'s demurrer to the first amended complaint is sustained without leave to amend.

The Court signed the proposed order submitted by email.

[See order and word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.]

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
